frothy fetch — fetch git deps into the local cache

Fetch resolves git dependencies declared in frothy.toml into the local cache so build can find them offline. Each git dep must name a pinned rev; branch tracking is deliberately not part of this command.

Examples:
  frothy fetch
      clone missing git deps and check out their pinned revs

Flags:
  -project string
    	project directory containing frothy.toml (default ".")
